title: CVE-2005-4364 — CVSS 5.8 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2005-4364

CVSS Score: 5.8 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2005-12-20T01:03:00.000
CWEs: NVD-CWE-Other

Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in index.cfm in Hot Banana Web Content Management Suite 5.3 allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the keywords parameter.

References: http://pridels0.blogspot.com/2005/12/hot-banana-xss-vuln.html, http://secunia.com/advisories/18126, http://www.osvdb.org/21786
